## 🎯 Change type
*Mark with X all the changes made*

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (change that causes incompatibility with previous versions)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation (documentation-only changes)
- [ ] 🎨 Code improvements (refactoring, formatting, etc.)
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvements
- [ ] ✅ Tests (add or fix tests)
- [ ] 🔧 Configuration (changes to configuration files)
